proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not QuotientRelation.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: QuotientRelation[T0]) { QuotientRelation.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[QuotientRelation[T0]](k0) } }[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i))
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { Option.some[QuotientRelation[T0]](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0)) = QuotientRelation.new[T0](ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0)) }[R](i)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -x0 - -x1 = -(x0 - x1) }[R](a, b)

goal: respects_unary_op[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i), R.neg) = forall(x0: R, x1: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, x0, x1) implies ideal_quotient_rel(i, -x0, -x1) }
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1(x2), x1(x3)) } = respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1) }[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i), R.neg)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, k0) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, -w0, -k0) } }
let w1: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w1) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, -w0, -w1) }
let w2: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w2) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, -w0, -w2) }
function(x0: R, x1: R) { not ideal_quotient_rel(i, x0, x1) or ideal_quotient_rel(i, -x0, -x1) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: QuotientOver[T0], x1: QuotientOver[T0], x2: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_binary_op[T0](T0.add, x0, x1) = ideal_quotient_add[T0](x2, x0, x1) }[R](quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b), i)
function[T0](x0: QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.rel(x1, x2) or quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x1) = quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x2) }[R](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a1, a2)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0).rel(x1, x2) = ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, a1, a2)
function[T0](x0: QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.rel(x1, x2) or quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x1) = quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x2) }[R](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b1, b2)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0).rel(x1, x2) = ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, b1, b2)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: QuotientOver[T0], x1: QuotientOver[T0], x2: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_binary_op[T0](T0.mul, x0, x1) = ideal_quotient_mul[T0](x2, x0, x1) }[R](quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b), i)
function[T0](x0: QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.rel(x1, x2) or quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x1) = quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x2) }[R](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a1, a2)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0).rel(x1, x2) = ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, a1, a2)
function[T0](x0: QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.rel(x1, x2) or quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x1) = quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x2) }[R](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b1, b2)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0).rel(x1, x2) = ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, b1, b2)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: QuotientOver[T0]) { quotient_over_unary_op[T0](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0), T0.neg, x1) = ideal_quotient_neg[T0](x0, x1) }[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a))
function[T0](x0: QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.rel(x1, x2) or quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x1) = quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x2) }[R](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a, b)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0).rel(x1, x2) = ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, a, b)

goal: ideal_quotient_add[R](i, ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b)), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)) = ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a + b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))
ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a + b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a + b + c)

ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))) = ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b + c))
ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b + c)) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a + (b + c))

proof: function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[R](a, b, c)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[R](b, a)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_mk[T0](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0), T0.0) = ideal_quotient_zero[T0](x0) }[R](i)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[R](R.0, a)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_mk[T0](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0), T0.0) = ideal_quotient_zero[T0](x0) }[R](i)

goal: ideal_quotient_add[R](i, ideal_quotient_neg[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a)), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a)) = ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), -a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a))

proof: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { -x0 + x0 = T0.0 }[R](a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_mk[T0](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0), T0.0) = ideal_quotient_zero[T0](x0) }[R](i)

goal: ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), ideal_quotient_neg[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a))) = ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), -a))

proof: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_mk[T0](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0), T0.0) = ideal_quotient_zero[T0](x0) }[R](i)

goal: ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b)), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)) = ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))
ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * b * c)

ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))) = ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b * c))
ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b * c)) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * (b * c))

proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[R](a, b, c)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[R](b, a)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[R](a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_mk[T0](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0), T0.1) = ideal_quotient_one[T0](x0) }[R](i)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[R](R.1, a)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[R](a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_mk[T0](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0), T0.1) = ideal_quotient_one[T0](x0) }[R](i)

goal: ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * (b + c))

ideal_quotient_add[R](i, ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b)), ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * b + a * c)
a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c
proof: function[T0: lib(semiring.base).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[R](a, b, c)

goal: quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * (b + c)) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * b + a * c)

ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b)), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), (a + b) * c)

ideal_quotient_add[R](i, ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)), ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * c + b * c)
(a + b) * c = a * c + b * c
proof: function[T0: lib(semiring.base).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[R](a, c, b)

goal: quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), (a + b) * c) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * c + b * c)
